attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who excels on long technical descents, capable of soloing 25+ km when established gap exists from earlier group moves.
team_tactics: Operates from early breakaway groups rather than GC team support; exploits descents after breakaway establishes gap on climbs.
terrain_preference: Long technical descents where descending skill creates separation; thrives in breakaway scenarios on mountain stages with multiple descent opportunities.
vulnerability: Single race observation limits vulnerability assessment; likely struggles in pure climbing battles against GC contenders or high-altitude finishes.
key_patterns: Attacks on descents rather than climbs to maximize technical skill advantage.
Successful from large breakaway groups (28 riders) rather than solo efforts from peloton.
Shows confidence under pressure when holding significant gaps solo for extended distances.
form_trajectory: positive: first road victory at Tour de France 2022 demonstrated breakthrough performance and descending prowess
